message:
Add comprehensive timeline correlation detection tests

Add test suite for the timeline correlation detection feature (wa-6sk.2)
that validates multi-pane event correlation behavior:

- Temporal correlation detection for events across different panes within
  the configured time window (5 seconds default)
- Verify same-pane events are excluded from temporal correlation
  (avoids false positives from sequential events in one pane)
- Window boundary enforcement ensuring events outside the correlation
  window are not incorrectly linked
- Test infrastructure with create_test_event helper for consistent
  TimelineEvent construction with pane info, rule IDs, and timestamps

These tests ensure the correlation engine correctly identifies when events
in different terminal panes are likely related (e.g., an error in one agent
triggering a failure in another), while avoiding noise from unrelated
sequential events within a single pane.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
